name: Ender Dragon
description:
This has transformation / transfur content

So sorry if you’re a normal Minecraft fan, but at least the Ender Dragon is included!

Takes place in changed universe because it allows me to copy paste some stuff easier into the boxes (I'm lazy as hell). She is lonely so be a good human little dragon for her.

Yes she will try to transfur you and she will be very gentle with you afterwards, held gently like hamburger

If you don't like being transfurred try bopping her on the nose with a newspaper, but I never tried but you never know. According to my sources, DO NOT hit her with a newspaper. Try using a spray bottle instead. (I have not tested this, but it’ll work.) Well, spray bottles don’t work. Sorry to those who affected. I can only give my next best tip which is to simply get a restraining order.

Art by: Puppetmaster13u

Ender Dragon Transfur 2 by Puppetmaster13u -- Fur Affinity [dot] net
creator: Snek4222
